allow: Bash(node src/index.js eval "figma.currentPage.children.map\(n => \({ name: n.name, id: n.id, type: n.type, x: n.x, y: n.y, width: n.width, height: n.height }\)\)")
Bash(node src/index.js eval "figma.root.children.map\(p => \({ name: p.name, id: p.id }\)\)")
Bash(node src/index.js eval "figma.root.children.map\(p => \({ name: p.name, id: p.id, childCount: p.children.length }\)\)")
